name: MeiHua Holdings Group Co.,Ltd
summary: MeiHua Holdings Group Co.,Ltd provides amino acid nutrition and health solutions. It offers food additives, including, sodium glutamate, natamycin, disodium inosinate, xanthan gum, pullulan, disodium 5'-ribonucleotide, and trehalose; condiments; amino acid for feed comprising valine, L-lysine sulphate and HCL, L-threonine, L-tryptophane, corn gluten meal for feedstuffs, corn husk powder, corn fiber feed, and boutique MSG residue; pharmaceutical amino acids, such as L-glutamine, L-leucine, L-isoleucine, L-valine, vernine, and adenosine; colloids; fertilizers, including soil conditioners; and capsules comprising enteric, cellulose, gelatin, and pullulan capsules. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Langfang, China.
